hindiTranslation: आसक्तिरहित होना पुत्र, स्त्री, घर आदिमें एकात्मता घनिष्ठ सम्बन्ध न होना और अनुकूलताप्रतिकूलताकी प्राप्तिमें चित्तका नित्य सम रहना ॥
englishTranslation: Freedom from attachment to sons, wife, home, and the like; and constant evenness of mind in desired and undesired events.
essence: Clinging fades; the mind stays level.
speaker: Krishna
